metadata.name: Cross-sell - Add a Line to Family Plan

description: An existing customer on a family plan wants to add a new line for their child.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and their current family plan details.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the customer has a family plan with one available slot.

nodes.task_description: Explain the monthly cost of adding the new line.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly states the additional cost.

nodes.task_description: Process the request to add a new line and ship a new SIM card.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the plan and orders a new SIM.
